TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: David Andersen nalecuhan i Melbourne, Victoria, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. David Andersen i 2002 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 37, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. 1 bulad 23 demiad, 1980 a mihca, David Andersen, miunduay.
S.PHON: da*id and…ôrs…ôn nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i m…ôr~…æbourn…ô, *i ¶toria, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. da*id and…ôrs…ôn i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu atr~…æanta ƒßawks putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, da*id and…ôrs…ôn, miunduaj.
S.FORM: David Andersen nalecuhan i Melbourne, Victoria, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. David Andersen i 2002 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 37, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. 1 bulad 23 demiad, 1980 a mihca, David Andersen, miunduay.
S.PHON: da*id and…ôrs…ôn nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i m…ôr~…æbourn…ô, *i ¶toria, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. da*id and…ôrs…ôn i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu atr~…æanta ƒßawks putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, da*id and…ôrs…ôn, miunduaj.
